meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build user onboarding flows to overcome a lack of portfolio. An intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for AI builders.
content.answer_block: To overcome the 'no portfolio' trap, build a sophisticated user onboarding flow. It demonstrates architectural thinking, state management, and UX empathy. By integrating Antigravity for rapid UI scaffolding and Claude Code for logic implementation, you transform a generic app into a professional-grade product that hiring managers actually respect.
content.intro:
You stare at the blank GitHub contributions graph, the crushing weight of 'no experience' looming over your career prospects. Every tutorial you finish feels like a hollow copy-paste job, leaving you without a signature project that proves you can actually ship software.

The secret isn't building a bigger app; it's building a smarter one. User onboarding is the silent validator of a senior engineer—it requires balancing complex state, asynchronous user data, and seamless UI transitions. Today, we bridge the gap between student and builder by constructing a high-impact onboarding flow that turns your first project into a portfolio-worthy asset.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding Schema
steps.description: Establish a robust data structure for user progress. You need to track completion states to persist data across sessions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a TypeScript interface for an onboarding flow tracking current step, user progress percentage, and completed boolean flags.
steps.claude_code_command: claude create --schema 'OnboardingState' --properties 'step: number, progress: number, isComplete: boolean'

steps.title: Architect the State Machine
steps.description: Implement a state machine to handle transitions between onboarding slides without messy boolean logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding flow into a finite state machine using XState patterns to manage navigation between welcome, setup, and tutorial steps.

steps.title: Build Responsive UI Components
steps.description: Create modular UI components that adapt to different onboarding stages, ensuring accessibility and performance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a set of accessible, responsive React components for an onboarding carousel with Framer Motion transitions.

steps.title: Implement Persistence Strategy
steps.description: Ensure the user onboarding state persists in local storage, demonstrating your understanding of client-side data management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a custom hook that syncs the onboarding state machine to localStorage and handles hydration errors gracefully.

steps.title: Add Analytics Hook
steps.description: Instrument the flow to track drop-off points, showing employers you care about user data and conversion metrics.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a middleware function to track onboarding step completion events and log them to a console-based mock analytics service.

pro_tips: Always build for the 'happy path' first, but document your failure handling in your README to show senior-level foresight.
Use Framer Motion to make UI transitions feel 'expensive'; subtle animations convey a high-polish brand identity.
Treat your onboarding state as a global store; avoid prop-drilling by leveraging Context API or Zustand.
Include a 'Skip' button. Forcing users through onboarding is a UX anti-pattern that signals inexperience.
Write your commit messages as if you are explaining them to a lead engineer during a code review.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, deploy your project to Vercel and write a technical post on LinkedIn detailing the state machine logic you implemented.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect opportunity and start creating your own by shipping production-grade code. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
